retry_reason: Put operations never fail; calling this function more than once would be a double-free.
contract_summary: This is an RCU callback that finalizes the cleanup of a dev map entry. It releases the dev reference via dev_put and, if present, releases the xdp_prog reference via bpf_prog_put. After both references are released, it frees the bpf_dtab_netdev structure. The caller (RCU infrastructure) ensures this function is called after a grace period. After returning, the object is freed and must not be accessed again. The function must be called exactly once per entry; calling it a second time would be a use-after-free.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release references on a net_device and optional xdp_prog, then free the bpf_dtab_netdev structure. The only non-refcount logic is the kfree, which is the standard final step of a put wrapper.
